heading: Omitted
label: 500 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which declared purpose of this subchapter for establishment of a reindeer industry, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 150 Stat. 900
Short Title, , which enacted this subchapter, was popularly known as the “Reindeer Industry Act of 1937”.Act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 89750 Stat. 900
Repeals, , which repealed provisions inconsistent with this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1750 Stat. 902

Authorization of Appropriations, , which authorized the appropriation of $2,000,000 to carry out this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1650 Stat. 902
